queries.question: Provide all sound designs and music scores created by Thomas Newman.
queries.sql:
SELECT SoundDesigns.description
FROM Creators JOIN SoundDesigns ON Creators.id = SoundDesigns.creatorId
WHERE Creators.name = "Thomas Newman"
UNION
SELECT MusicScores.description
FROM Creators JOIN MusicScores ON Creators.id = MusicScores.creatorId
WHERE Creators.name = "Thomas Newman"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?creators a :Creators .
    ?sounddesigns a :SoundDesigns .
    ?sounddesigns p:hasCreators ?creators .
    ?sounddesigns p:description ?description .
    ?creators p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Thomas Newman")
    BIND(?description AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?creators a :Creators .
    ?musicscores a :SoundDesigns .
    ?musicscores p:hasCreators ?creators .
    ?musicscores p:description ?description .
    ?creators p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Thomas Newman")
    BIND(?description AS ?o0)
  }
}
